requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (Francophone IEC Alignment)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法语区IEC技术路线）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（法語區IEC技術路線）

summary.en: Mali, as a Francophone West African country, aligns technically with the IEC standards ecosystem adopted across the ECOWAS and WAEMU (UEMOA) region. AMANORM (Agence Malienne de Normalisation), Mali's national standards body, adopts IEC standards as national standards where relevant. EV charger connector standards for any IEC-aligned market in Mali follow IEC 62196: AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler and DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) as defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. Although Mali's four-wheel EV market is nascent, any donor-funded, NGO, government, or commercial EV charging project that references international standards will specify IEC 62196-compatible connectors as the procurement standard, since GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets. Note: the practical 2/3-wheel electric vehicle market in Mali may use different charging interfaces (typically proprietary or simple DC barrel connectors); however, for four-wheel EVSE, IEC 62196 is the applicable international standard.
summary.zh: 马里是西非法语国家，技术上与西非国家经济共同体（ECOWAS）和西非经济货币联盟（UEMOA/WAEMU）区域采用的IEC标准体系一致。马里国家标准机构AMANORM（马里标准化局）在相关领域采用IEC标准作为国家标准。马里IEC对齐市场的电动汽车充电桩接口标准遵循IEC 62196：交流充电采用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充采用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。尽管马里四轮电动汽车市场极为初级，但任何援助资助、非政府组织、政府或商业电动汽车充电项目若参考国际标准，均将以IEC 62196兼容接口作为采购标准，因为GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆接口物理上不兼容。注意：马里实际的两/三轮电动车市场可能使用不同的充电接口（通常为专有或简单的直流圆形接口）；但对于四轮EVSE，IEC 62196是适用的国际标准。
summary.zht: 馬里是西非法語國家，技術上與西非國家經濟共同體（ECOWAS）和西非經濟貨幣聯盟（UEMOA/WAEMU）區域採用的IEC標準體系一致。馬里國家標準機構AMANORM（馬里標準化局）在相關領域採用IEC標準作為國家標準。馬里IEC對齊市場的電動汽車充電樁接口標準遵循IEC 62196：交流充電採用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器，直流快充採用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。儘管馬里四輪電動汽車市場極為初級，但任何援助資助、非政府組織、政府或商業電動汽車充電項目若參考國際標準，均將以IEC 62196兼容接口作為採購標準，因為GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛接口物理上不兼容。注意：馬里實際的兩/三輪電動車市場可能使用不同的充電接口（通常為專有或簡單的直流圓形接口）；但對於四輪EVSE，IEC 62196是適用的國際標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
AMANORM — Agence Malienne de Normalisation (adopts IEC standards as national standards)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a superficially similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T: male at charger, female vehicle inlet; Type 2: female at charger, male vehicle inlet), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement — making them physically and electrically incompatible with each other. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus communication per GB/T 27930, geometrically different from CCS2 and incompatible with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used in CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2表面相似，但两者在接口性别（GB/T：充电桩端为公口、车辆接口为母口；Type 2：充电桩端为母口、车辆接口为公口）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）和触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器采用九针配置，通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，几何形状与CCS2不同，且与CCS2部署所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2表面相似，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T：充電樁端為公口、車輛接口為母口；Type 2：充電樁端為母口、車輛接口為公口）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）和觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器採用九針配置，通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，幾何形狀與CCS2不同，且與CCS2部署所用的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-compatible with any IEC 62196 vehicle or project specification in Mali. Conversion to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) or CCS2 (DC) requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118), labels, accredited test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not accepted as a project-compliant connector substitute. Because Mali's four-wheel EV fleet is extremely small, exporters should verify that the specific project, partner, or vehicle type actually requires Type 2 / CCS2 before committing to connector redesign investment.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩与马里任何IEC 62196车辆或项目规范均不兼容。改装为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）或CCS2（直流）需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、认可测试报告、温升证据和备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不被接受为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。由于马里四轮电动汽车保有量极少，出口商在确认接口重新设计投入前，应核实具体项目、合作方或车辆类型是否确实需要Type 2 / CCS2。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁與馬里任何IEC 62196車輛或項目規範均不兼容。改裝為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）或CCS2（直流）需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、認可測試報告、溫升證據和備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不被接受為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。由於馬里四輪電動汽車保有量極少，出口商在確認接口重新設計投入前，應核實具體項目、合作方或車輛類型是否確實需要Type 2 / CCS2。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by the project, donor, operator, or AMANORM-adopted IEC standard; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design only; it is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute and connectors are physically incompatible

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Given Mali's extremely nascent four-wheel EV market, exporters should first confirm the specific vehicle fleet and project connector requirement before committing to IEC 62196 hardware conversion. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从GB/T 20234改装为IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2是硬件和协议的重新设计，而非文件替换。鉴于马里四轮电动汽车市场极为初级，出口商在确认IEC 62196硬件改装投入前，应首先核实具体车队和项目的接口要求。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從GB/T 20234改裝為IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2是硬體和協議的重新設計，而非文件替換。鑒於馬里四輪電動汽車市場極為初級，出口商在確認IEC 62196硬體改裝投入前，應首先核實具體車隊和項目的接口要求。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
